title: Phased rollout timeline
description: Horizontal phase/section rows over period columns with colored duration bars and milestone diamonds. Maps 1:1 to the gantt content contract from _gantt_block / add_gantt layouts.py.

props.name: periods
props.description: Time columns: [{key, label}]. key matches bars.period_key for positioning.

props.name: phases
props.description: Section rows: [{name, color?, tasks[{label, bars[{period_key, start, duration, color?, label?}]}], milestone?{period_key, position, label, date?}}]. Mirrors gantt 'sections' contract from layouts.py.

props.name: accent
props.description: Fallback color token for bars/milestones without explicit color.
